_comment: Agent Triforge — OPTIONAL Gemini hooks. To enable, merge the `hooks` block into your project's .gemini/settings.json (alongside the existing `agents.overrides` block). Gemini will warn on first session that project hooks exist — this is expected; review the commands and confirm they are what you want.
_events_tested: SessionStart, BeforeAgent, AfterAgent, AfterTool all fire under `gemini -p` (non-interactive).

hooks.name: log-write-to-changelog
hooks.command: python3 -c 'import sys,json,datetime; d=json.load(sys.stdin); p=(d.get("tool_input",{}) or {}).get("file_path","?"); open("ops/CHANGELOG.md","a").write("- ["+datetime.datetime.now().isoformat(timespec="seconds")+"] gemini write_file: "+p+"\n")' && echo '{}'
